agilitycompetition

Class Contest

  • java.lang.Object
    • agilitycompetition.Contest

  • public class Contest
extends java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Contest(java.lang.String location, java.lang.String sponsor, Date date)
      Parameterized Constructor

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addContestant(Competitor d)
      Adds a new competitor to the ArrayList contestants
      void determineWinners()
      Sorts the ArrayList and then assigns the first second and third place winners from the resulting sorted ArrayList.
      Competitor getContestantAt(int i)
      Accessor for the ArrayList
      Date getContestDate()
      Accessor for Contest Date
      java.lang.String getContestLocation()
      Accessor for contest location
      java.lang.String getContestSponsor()
      Accessor for the contest sponsor
      int getNumberOfContestants()
      Accessor for the size of the ArrayList which will allow a for loop to be used in the client code (main) for printing or searching.
      Competitor getSecond()
      Accessor for the second place Competitor object Preconditions: the arrayList has been loaded and determineWinners() has been called
      Competitor getThird()
      Accessor for the third place Competitor object Preconditions: the arrayList has been loaded and determineWinners() has been called
      Competitor getWinner()
      Accessor for the winner Competitor object Preconditions: the arrayList has been loaded and determineWinners() has been called

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Contest

        public Contest(java.lang.String location,
               java.lang.String sponsor,
               Date date)
        Parameterized Constructor
        Parameters:
        location - the city where the competition was held
        sponsor - the company sponsoring the competition
        date - the date of the competition

    • Method Detail

      • addContestant

        public void addContestant(Competitor d)
        Adds a new competitor to the ArrayList contestants
        Parameters:
        d - a new competitor

      • determineWinners

        public void determineWinners()
        Sorts the ArrayList and then assigns the first second and third place winners from the resulting sorted ArrayList. We can use the Java Collections.sort because we wrote a compareTo() method for Dog and used the implements clause in the class declaration.

      • getContestLocation

        public java.lang.String getContestLocation()
        Accessor for contest location
        Returns:
        the string for the contest location

      • getContestSponsor

        public java.lang.String getContestSponsor()
        Accessor for the contest sponsor
        Returns:
        the string for the contest sponsor

      • getContestDate

        public Date getContestDate()
        Accessor for Contest Date
        Returns:
        the contestDate object

      • getContestantAt

        public Competitor getContestantAt(int i)
        Accessor for the ArrayList
        Parameters:
        i - the index of the element we want
        Returns:
        the Dog object at location i

      • getNumberOfContestants

        public int getNumberOfContestants()
        Accessor for the size of the ArrayList which will allow a for loop to be used in the client code (main) for printing or searching.
        Returns:
        the size of the ArrayList

      • getWinner

        public Competitor getWinner()
        Accessor for the winner Competitor object Preconditions: the arrayList has been loaded and determineWinners() has been called
        Returns:
        the object identified as the competitor with the lowest time on the course.

      • getSecond

        public Competitor getSecond()
        Accessor for the second place Competitor object Preconditions: the arrayList has been loaded and determineWinners() has been called
        Returns:
        the object identified as the competitor with the second lowest time on the course.

      • getThird

        public Competitor getThird()
        Accessor for the third place Competitor object Preconditions: the arrayList has been loaded and determineWinners() has been called
        Returns:
        the object identified as the competitor with the third lowest time on the course.
